name: Color Pencil Run
author: Poki
description: Color Pencil Run is a racing game where your goal is to grow your pencil as long as possible! You’ll start with a tiny pencil, guiding it forward while drawing on the floor. Dodge obstacles, collect matching colors to grow bigger, and see how far you can go. At the end of each round, your pencil’s length is put to the test as blocks slice it down to size. Don’t worry if you fall short—you can use the coins you earn to upgrade your pencil and give it another go. Can you grow the biggest pencil and reach the finish line? How to play Color Pencil Run? Swipe right or left to play. You can also use A/D or left and right arrow keys. Who created Color Pencil Run? Color Pencil Run is created by OSA Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Smash It ! How can I play Color Pencil Run for free? You can play Color Pencil Run for free on Poki. Can I play Color Pencil Run on mobile devices and desktop? Color Pencil Run can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
